projectDescription: A Django web application that connects students seeking internships with companies posting opportunities, featuring role-based dashboards, application management, and real-time notifications.
keyFeatures: Role-based accounts: Student and Company user types with distinct dashboards
Internship management: Companies can create, edit, delete, and toggle active/closed status
Application workflow: Students apply to internships; companies accept or reject applications
Real-time notifications: In-app bell notifications for new applications and status changes
Profile management: Students upload CVs and profile pictures; companies provide business details
Public student profiles: Companies can view student profiles when reviewing applications
Auto-created profiles via Django signals on user registration
Duplicate prevention: Unique constraint ensures a student can apply to each internship once
publicApiSurface: GET /internships/<id>/ — internship detail with apply status check
POST /internships/create/ — create a new internship (company only)
GET /applications/company/ — list company's received applications (filterable by status)
POST /applications/<id>/<status>/ — accept or reject an application (company only)
POST /applications/notifications/read/ — mark all notifications as read
GET/POST /users/register/ — register as student or company
POST /users/profile/edit/ — edit profile fields, CV, and profile picture
